---
title: "Andres Martinez Gonzalez"
subtitle: "Economist"
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: rounded
---

I am an economist at the Autoridad Independiente de Responsabilidad Fiscal (AIReF), Spain’s independent fiscal institution, based in Madrid.

I work on applied fiscal policy and macroeconomic analysis, at the intersection of econometrics, EU fiscal governance, and long-run growth modelling. 

This page collects a set of technical notes and small projects in R that I wrote during my master’s and the years after; mostly working through methods in time series, Bayesian computation, and statistical learning.

andres.mtnez.glez[at]gmail[.com]


## Research interests

- EU fiscal governance
- Macroeconomics, SVARs and Local Projections 
- Long-term growth, productivity and potential output modelling
- Independent Fiscal Institutions
